name: Aguado, Joseph
clubs: Student Member of A. I. E. E.
First Sergeant, R. O. T. C.
description: He has swum for Hopkins and been on the lacrosse squad in his freshman, sophomore, and junior years. Engineering is his future work.

name: Arndt, Eric M.
clubs: Student Chapter, American Society of Civil Engineers
description: Before coming to Hopkins, Rick studied at Shortridge High School, in Indianapolis, and at Purdue University. He will probably go into business.

name: Ball, Wilmot Coles
clubs: orchestra during the last three years
S. A. T. C. during the war
R. O. T. C. for two years
description: His future work is electrical engineering.

name: Baroway, Israel
clubs: R. O. T. C. two years
Executive Committee of the Johns Hopkins Zionist Society
Hopkins delegate to the Intercollegiate Zionist Convention in New York this year
chairman of the Committee for the Relief of Jewish Students in Europe
description: His future vocation is journalism.

name: Basford, Emory Shelvy
clubs: Board of Editors of the Black and Blue Jay
description: He is going into educational work.

name: Benson, John Oregon
description: In April, 1917, he enlisted in the navy and served until January, 1919. He was commissioned 2nd Lieutenant, Marine Aviation, and saw foreign service in France and Belgium. At Hopkins he has been on the football squad four years, receiving his "H" this year. He was a member of his class baseball team freshman and sophomore years.

name: Lawrence Elwood Biemiller
clubs: manager of the class track team
assistant manager of baseball two years
manager of baseball junior and senior years
description: He has been awarded an "H" and a Varsity Seal. He expects to go into industrial chemical engineering work.

name: John Frederick Birkmeyer
description: After graduating he is going to take up work in industrial chemistry or graduate work in geology.

name: Boone, James Rawlins Herbert
description: During the War he enlisted in the navy. He was stationed at Newport and later transferred to Hopkins during the S. A. T. C. He is going into business in Baltimore.

name: Bowers, Ralph Firestone
clubs: director of the Mandolin Club and orchestra
description: Mike went to Gettysburg College for one year after leaving Frederick High School. He was in the S. A. T. C. in 1918. Next year he will commence the study of medicine.

name: Boyd, Charles Holmes
description: He does not know what he will do next year.

name: Bramble, Forrest Fulton
description: He has won a Hopkins scholarship three years. He will study law at Harvard and practice in Baltimore.

name: Britt, Otto Washington
high school: Western Maryland College at Westminster; Wilmington Conference Academy, Dover, Del.
description: He is a minister of the Methodist Episcopal Church.

name: Brotman, Harry
high school: South Side High School, Newark, N. J.
description: He is going to be a physician.

name: Calkins, Frederick Russell Jr.
clubs: Infantry at Camp Taylor, Kentucky, receiving a commission as 1st Lieutenant
description: Eric has won his "H" in football three years and his "H.A.A." in both track and baseball. He was secretary of the Glee Club in sophomore year and corresponding secretary of the Athletic Board senior year. During the war he was in the infantry at Camp Taylor, Kentucky, receiving a commission as 1st Lieutenant. He will take up graduate work in geology.

name: Call, Lewis Wellington Jr.
description: He was in the S. A. T. C., and has been in the R. O. T. C. four years. He is Captain of C Company. He is a member of the Scabbard and Blade. He has been on the independent swimming team and the regular swimming team since its recognition. He was on the track squad in freshman year and the rifle team senior year.

name: Burdelle Sittler Cannon
clubs: chairman of the Freshman-Sophomore Debate Committee
description: Next year he will go to the Medical School.

name: Edward Hazel Cashell
clubs: class teams (captain of basketball in freshman year)
class lacrosse team (captain in sophomore year)
description: He has won an "H" in football four years and was captain in sophomore year. He has also been awarded an "H" in lacrosse and basketball. In freshman year he played on four class teams, being captain of basketball. In sophomore year he was captain of the class lacrosse team.

name: Cattanach, Lachlan McArthur
clubs: class business manager of the HULLABALOO
R. O. T. C. (four years, captain)
description: He is going to the Medical School next year.

name: Chandler, Albert Norris
description: His future work will be mechanical engineering.

name: Chenoweth, George Leroy
description: He is going to take up industrial or research work, or possibly return for graduate work.

name: Chisholm, Charles Fillmore
clubs: Major in the R. O. T. C., in command of the battalion
Captain of the Scabbard and Blade

name: Maurice Cohen
clubs: R. O. T. C. (corporal second year, sergeant third year, captain this year)
Student Chapter, A. S. C. E.
description: His future work will be engineering.

name: Collins, Robert Edward Lee
description: He expects to enter some branch of geology.

name: Collins, William Bond
clubs: assistant manager of lacrosse three years
chairman of the Banquet Committee last year
description: His future work is in the line of hydro-electric and electric railways.

name: Douglas Coulter
clubs: Y. M. C. A. Deputation Team
description: He intends to travel.

name: Mervin Monroe Deems
clubs: Class Lacrosse Team (freshman and sophomore years)
Editorial Staff of the Black and Blue Jay
description: He declares he is going to work to beat Hell—in the ministry.

name: Deichmann, George Lipps Jr.
clubs: assistant business manager of the News-Letter
description: He was awarded the Varsity Seal and is a member of the Varsity Seal Voting Council.

name: Dixon, Allan Rhodes
high school: Hamilton Technical School, Hamilton, Ontario, and to the Baltimore Polytechnic Institute
clubs: S. A. T. C. at Hopkins
description: He served in the S. A. T. C. at Hopkins and has been in the R. O. T. C. two years.

name: Douglas, John Gray
clubs: private in the R. O. T. C.
description: He will return to the University next year.

name: Downey, Frank Jones
description: He will take up industrial work or graduate work in chemistry.

name: Earle, Richard Tilghman
clubs: sergeant-major in the R. O. T. C.
description: He was on the lacrosse squad two years. He was sergeant-major in the R. O. T. C. freshman and sophomore years. He has been on the Cotillion Board two years.

name: Eastland, John Sheldon
description: He was a member of the Students' Army Training Corps. He intends to become a doctor.

name: Leon Edelson
clubs: R. O. T. C., freshman year

name: Abraham Fedder
clubs: treasurer of the J. H. U. Zionist Society in 1920
description: He expects to take graduate work in political economy.

name: Morton, Harry Feldman
description: Feldman came to Hopkins from Woodbine High School. He was in the S. A. T. C. during the war. He is a member of the J. H. U. Zionist Society. Next year he will commence the study of medicine.

name: Finesinger, Abraham Leonard
description: Abe prepared at the Oil City (Pa.) High School. He is a member of the Zionist Society and the Hebrew Circle. Next year he will take up graduate work in psychology.

name: Finesinger, Sol Baruch
description: He won a Hopkins scholarship sophomore year. He expects to do graduate work in Semitics.

name: Finkelstein, Abraham
clubs: Student Chapter, American Society of Civil Engineers

name: Foote, Edward Lester
description: Next year he is going to medical school.

name: Foster, Reuben
clubs: Naval Unit of the S. A. T. C. at Hopkins
treasurer and vice-president of the Literary Club
Editorial Staff of the Black and Blue Jay
description: Next year he is going to the Harvard Law School.

name: Fox, Ezekiel Chester
description: After graduating he will do work in geology.

name: Goetz, George
clubs: vice-president and president of the Class of 1922
description: He represented Hopkins in the Southern Oratorical Contest last year.

name: Goldring, Louis Nugent
clubs: R. O. T. C. freshman year
description: His future work is electrical engineering.

name: Gould, Theodore
major: ACADEMIC B Θ Π O Δ K
clubs: secretary, Eastern Collegiate Swimming Association, which he founded
Hopkins speaker in Southern Oratorical League, of which he is president

name: Halle, Jesse Mann
clubs: Corporal in the R. O. T. C.
description: He won a Hopkins Scholarship for 1919-20. He intends to be an accountant.

name: Haseltine, Raymond Holden
clubs: S. A. T. C. at Hopkins
description: He won an "HAA" last year and an "H" this year. He will probably come back next year to study geology.

name: Heiner, Robert Graham
major: ACADEMIC A Δ Φ O Δ K Φ B K
clubs: president of the O D K Circle
chairman of the Varsity Seal Voting Council
secretary of the Class three years
description: He received an "HAA" in football and numerals in track. Next year he will study law at Oxford as a Rhodes Scholar.

name: Howard, Nelson Jacob
description: He expects to study medicine.

name: Hubbard, Thomas Foy
clubs: art editor of the HULLA-BALOO and *Black and Blue Jay*
description: He will enter the ministry.

name: Calvin Hyman
description: Next year he will commence the study of medicine.

name: George Thaxton Jenkins
description: He is a reporter on the Baltimore Sun.

name: Johnson, James Thomas
description: During the war he served in the navy for a year. He intends to study medicine.

name: Jones, Elmer James
description: He served in the navy for a year and a half during the war. He has won his "H" in football four years and was captain in 1919. He won an "H" in baseball in 1918. He has been sergeant-at-arms of the Class four years. Next year he will enter the University of Maryland Law School.

name: Jones, John Melbourne
description: He expects to work in the chemical line.

name: Kairys, Fred
description: He is coming back next year to do graduate work in geology.

name: Kalnit, George Theodore
high school: South Side High School, Newark, N. J.
description: Before coming to Johns Hopkins, he went for two years to New York University, where he was a member of the Students' Army Training Corps. He is going to study medicine.

name: Keen, George Washington
clubs: freshman and sophomore class baseball teams
description: He entered the Class in 1918. He was on the freshman and sophomore class baseball teams and has been on the baseball squad three years.

name: Kennady, Bascom King
description: He has been on the basketball and swimming teams, winning his "H" in basketball, and, in his junior year, the managership. He has been vice-president of the Class twice and delegate to the Student Council. He is business manager of the HULLABALOO, advertising manager of the Jay and editor of the "Y" Handbook. He is a member of the Cane Club and secretary of O D K. He is in the Social Science Club and Y. M. C. A. Cabinet.

name: Kesting, Theodore Edward
clubs: Student Chapter, American Society of Civil Engineers
description: He served in the S. A. T. C. during the war. He is a member of the Student Chapter, American Society of Civil Engineers. He has been on the tennis team in sophomore and senior years.

name: Keyes, Norman Chase
description: Next year he is going to the General Theological Seminary in New York.

name: Kurrelmeyer, Bernhard
description: He intends to do research work in chemistry.

name: Lachman, Sander Edwin
description: He served in the S. A. T. C. during the war. He will pursue the study of medicine.

name: Lord, Llewellyn Williams
clubs: News-Letter staff (four years, Varsity Seal, editor-in-chief)
description: He has been on the News-Letter staff four years, receiving a Varsity Seal, and is editor-in-chief this year. He is on the HULLABALOO Board. He has been on the swimming team and the class football and track teams. Last year he was editor of the Athletic Publicity Bureau. He received an "HAA" in football and was assistant manager of baseball two years. He is going to the Medical School next year.

name: Macht, Louis Ephraim
description: His future work embraces politics, law and business.

name: Marcuse, John Alexander
clubs: vice-president of the class in freshman year
captain of the boxing team for two years
description: After graduation he will enter business in New York.

name: Miller, Leo Daniel Biser
clubs: Johns Hopkins Symphony Orchestra in sophomore year
description: He intends to go into industrial or commercial work.

name: Millikin, Neil
clubs: R. O. T. C. two years
description: He is going to study medicine.

name: Morgan, Tilghman Vickers
description: He expects to be a lawyer.

name: Morici, Theodore
clubs: sergeant in the Science and Research Division
description: He expects to become a doctor.

name: Mossom, Donald Stuart
clubs: manager of the sophomore baseball team
description: He intends to be a geologist.

name: Mullikin, Kent Roberts
high school: Upper Marlboro High School and City College
clubs: captain of the class track team
description: He will probably return for graduate work in geology.

name: Murphy, Lawrence Dixon
description: He is going to study medicine.

name: Myers, Willis Adelbert
clubs: S. A. T. C. sophomore year
R. O. T. C. two years, attending the Plattsburgh Camp in the summer of 1918
description: He wrote three football songs in the fall of 1919. He has not decided what he will do next year.

name: William K. Nicholson
description: He is going into mechanical engineering.

name: Henry Darling Niles
description: In freshman year he played on the class lacrosse team; was assistant manager of track and won a Hopkins scholarship. In sophomore year he was on the lacrosse squad and was assistant manager of track. He is going to the Johns Hopkins Medical School.

name: Norris, Edward Taylor
description: He expects to go into business.

name: Norwood, Vernon Hyatt
clubs: manager of his freshman track team
description: He is going to the Johns Hopkins Medical School.

name: Parker, Richard Alexander
description: Next year he will do graduate work in English, French and German literatures.

name: Perkins, Clarence Warwick Jr.
clubs: chairman of the Senior Prom Committee
editor of the Black and Blue Jay
description: He has not decided what he will do next year.

name: Pickford, Edward Morse
clubs: sergeant in the S. A. T. C.
description: He is going to the Medical School next year.

name: Pikoos, Abraham
clubs: Student Chapter, A. S. C. E.
description: During the war he served with Co. C, 34th Field Signal Battalion, in France from July, 1918, to March, 1919. He was then in the Sorbonne Detachment to July, 1919.

name: Prince, Henry Lewis Jr.
clubs: class track and football teams freshman and sophomore years
member of the Musical Clubs four years
R. O. T. C. two years

name: Pusch, Lewis Charles
major: Academic II K A, School of Engineering
clubs: S. A. T. C. at Western Reserve University
description: He entered Hopkins last fall with senior standing. Next year he is going to the Medical School.

name: Rector, Nelson Hamilton
clubs: Corporal, Co. B, S. A. T. C.
Student Chapter, American Society of Civil Engineers

name: Reed, Harold
clubs: Class track team (freshman and sophomore years)
Chairman, Y. M. C. A. deputation team
description: He will prepare for the Christian ministry.

name: Reed, James Robinson
clubs: football (three years, received an "H" this year)
freshman football, lacrosse and track teams
description: He served in the S. A. T. C. during the war. He has played football three years, receiving an "H" this year. He is manager of the basketball team. He has been on the lacrosse squad two years. He was on the freshman football, lacrosse and track teams and the sophomore football team.

name: Ritter, William Townsend
description: He will study medicine.

name: Roskes, David Stanley
description: Roskes prepared for Hopkins at the Baltimore Polytechnic Institute. He was in the Reserve Officers' Training Corps freshman and sophomore years.

name: Rossing, John Milton
description: Rossing went to Williamsport Dickinson Seminary and then to Dickinson College for one year. He received his degree on February 22. He will enter the ministry.

name: Ruark, Arthur Edward
high school: Shepherd College, State Normal School, Shepherdstown, W. Va., and Towson High School
clubs: private in the S. A. T. C.
Executive Council of the Mathematics Club
description: He will return to the University next year to take graduate work leading to a Ph. D. in physics and mathematics.

name: Rupp, Walter
clubs: Student Chapter, A. S. C. E.
description: His future work is civil engineering.

name: Rutledge, Benjamin Huger Jr.
description: He came to Hopkins from V. M. I. in junior year. Next year he is going to the Medical School.

name: Sadtler, Howard Plitt Jr.
description: He is going into business.

name: Scheidt, Melvin Edgar
clubs: Student Chapter, A. S. C. E.
description: He has not decided what he will do next year.

name: Shamberger, Samuel Joseph
description: He has been in the Musical Clubs for two years.

name: Arthur Shapiro
description: Ottse came to the University from the Baltimore Polytechnic Institute, entering the class in 1919. He was in the R. O. T. C. two years.

name: Shaw, Edwin Herbert Jr.
description: Ed came to Hopkins from Baltimore City College. He has been in the R. O. T. C. for four years and is a member of the Scabbard and Blade. He is going to come back next year for graduate work in chemistry.

name: Milton Sherry
description: He is going to study medicine.

name: Albert Van Deaver Smith
description: He was a midshipman at the Naval Academy from 1917 to 1919.

name: Smith, Frank Robert Jr.
clubs: property man for the Dramatic Club
property manager of the Dramatic Club
description: He is going to the Medical School next year.

name: Smith, Richard Bromwell
clubs: Student Chapter, A. S. C. E.

name: Carroll Stansbury
high school: McKinley Manual Training School in Washington
clubs: Board of Editors of the News-Letter
description: He entered Hopkins in 1916, but was absent for a year at an Officers’ Training Camp, from which he received a commission of second lieutenant.

name: Leroy Victor Strasburger
description: In freshman year he was on the class lacrosse team and was assistant manager of track. He was on the lacrosse squad in sophomore year and has been in the R. O. T. C.

name: Strauss, Hyman
description: He will study medicine.

name: Suwall, Felix Stephen
clubs: N. S. Ammonium Nitrate Plant at Perry Point, Md.
description: He is going into industrial chemical work.

name: Taylor, Edmund Randolph Jr.
clubs: senior class delegate to the Student Council
chairman of the senior banquet committee
description: Ed went to the Episcopal High School for four years and is a captain this year. He was on the class track squad two years and the Varsity track squad two years. In junior year he was vice-president of the Class and a member of the banquet committee. He then became secretary of the senior class, the senior class delegate to the Student Council, and chairman of the senior banquet committee. He has been a member of the R. O. T. C.

name: Teders, Victor Gerald
high school: Martinsburg High School, Martinsburg, W. Va.
description: Teders received his preparatory education at the Martinsburg High School, Martinsburg, W. Va. He was in the Reserve Officers’ Training Corps freshman and sophomore years.

name: Tipton, William Dolley
description: He intends to go into aeronautical engineering.

name: Trew, Bartus
clubs: business manager of the Dramatic Club two years
president of the Dramatic Club this year
business manager of the Black and Blue Jay
description: He has been in its major production each year and has received the Varsity Seal. He managed the intercollegiate debate last year. He expects to go into business.

name: Bartow Van Ness, Jr.
clubs: Track team (four years, winning his 'H' twice)
Class track team (manager in freshman year, captain in sophomore year)
Sergeant, B Company, S. A. T. C.

name: Clinton Carroll Waters
clubs: Circulation manager, Black and Blue Jay

name: Weil, Louis
description: Louis came to Johns Hopkins from the Baltimore Polytechnic Institute. He served in the S. A. T. C. and was in the R. O. T. C. freshman year.

name: Weisberg, Henry
clubs: Student Chapter, American Society of Civil Engineers
description: Dutch went to the Baltimore Polytechnic Institute. He has been in the R. O. T. C. two years.

name: Wessells, Walter Byrd
description: He expects to take up aeronautical engineering.

name: Wilhelm, James Roland
description: He expects to work next year in some chemical position.

name: Wood, Edmund Scott
description: Ed came to Hopkins from Swarthmore High School. He has won an "H" in football three years and was captain of the team this year. He has also won his letter in lacrosse and basketball.

name: Wright, Chauncey Bechtle
description: Heavy prepared at Marshall College. He served in the S. A. T. C. He has been on the football squad two years and the lacrosse squad three. Next year he is going to the Medical School.
